dialogues.name: MATT HAITCH
dialogues.text: Skyfall is the fight to find one's place in a dangerous new world. When M, the head of Britain's MI6 prioritizes the mission over his very life, James Bond is badly wounded and left for dead. licking his wounds in seclusion, he returns to join the fight like a loyal soldier when M's personal safety and all of MI6 are put at risk, James finds himself broken down, out of shape, and a relic of a previous age of espionage. On the track of Silva, a vestige of M's deeper past, who shares many of his characteristics, James is forced to retreat and make a final desperate stand at his ancestral home. Will he save himself and those he treasures? Or will he lose it all? At Skyfall? [Jason laughs]
